notes: Ollama Cloud models invoked via the `ollama launch claude` shim.
Uses Claude Code CLI in headless mode (-p with --output-format stream-json).
isolate_home defaults to false so Claude subscription auth (read from ~/.claude/) works.
Ollama Cloud models invoked via the `ollama launch codex` shim.
Uses `codex exec --json --ephemeral` with full autonomy flags.
Per-model `command_prefix` replaces the default `codex` leader so the harness routes through Ollama Cloud.

Codex context overflow on long agentic runs is a known issue for `:cloud` models through `ollama launch codex`: codex can't read context metadata from Ollama's `/v1` endpoint (openai/codex#14757), and pinning `model_context_window` triggers `fill_to_context_window` prompt-padding (openai/codex#16068). Setting `model_auto_compact_token_limit` alone has also been observed to make things worse. Prefer the claude or opencode harness for these models when long-horizon runs matter.
Ollama Cloud models invoked via the `ollama launch opencode` shim.
Uses `opencode run --agent build --format json` with full autonomy.
Per-model `command_prefix` replaces the default `opencode` leader so the harness routes through Ollama Cloud.

models.label: Kimi K2.6 (Ollama Cloud)
models.selection_reason: Best Kimi model on Ollama Cloud. State-of-the-art coding + long-horizon execution + multimodal agent swarm.

models.label: Qwen 3.5 (Ollama Cloud)
models.selection_reason: Best Qwen model on Ollama Cloud. Reasoning, coding, and agentic tool use with vision.

models.label: GLM 5.1 (Ollama Cloud)
models.selection_reason: Best GLM model on Ollama Cloud. Long-horizon agentic engineering with autonomous execution and sustained iteration.

models.label: MiniMax M2.7 (Ollama Cloud)
models.selection_reason: Best MiniMax model on Ollama Cloud. Mid-tier model testing Python-stack knowledge and LangChain wiring capability.

models.label: DeepSeek V4 Pro (Ollama Cloud)
models.selection_reason: Best DeepSeek model on Ollama Cloud. Tests whether Ollama Cloud serving avoids the reasoning_content multi-turn bug seen via OpenRouter/opencode.

models.label: DeepSeek V4 Flash (Ollama Cloud)
models.selection_reason: Faster DeepSeek V4 tier on Ollama Cloud — latency/cost tradeoff vs V4 Pro on the same brief.

models.label: Gemma 4 31B (Ollama Cloud)
models.selection_reason: Google Gemma 4 on Ollama Cloud (`gemma4:31b-cloud`; `gemma4:cloud` is not published on the registry) — cross-vendor baseline on the Django + Channels brief.

models.label: Nemotron 3 Super (Ollama Cloud)
models.selection_reason: NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Super on Ollama Cloud — agentic coding baseline in the cloud registry.

models.label: Gemini 3 Flash Preview (Ollama Cloud)
models.selection_reason: Gemini 3 Flash preview on Ollama Cloud — preview-tier speed/latency check against the shared harness.
